dialogDescription: The development loop needs both the Claude Code and Codex CLIs installed and signed in. Detection is read-only — it never runs the agents.
subscriptionCostNote: Usage counts against your plan quota — no per-token charge.
apiKeyCostNote: Billed pay-per-token against your provider API account.
authUnknownHint: No clean signal to confirm sign-in (e.g. credentials stored in the macOS Keychain). If the development loop reports auth errors, run {authCommand}.
copyFailedDescription: Select and copy the command manually.
commandScrollAriaLabel: {label} command — scroll to read the full line
warningSuffix: The development loop needs both CLIs installed and signed in to run.

gate.title: Install the agent CLIs
gate.description: {brandName} runs on two agent CLIs — Claude Code and Codex. Both must be installed on this machine before anything can run.

authBanner.title: Agent sign-in needed
authBanner.agentLine: {label} is installed but not signed in — run {authCommand} in your terminal.
